title: Batch Deletion of Automations
excerpt: I have a long list of automations on one board. As new features are added and I discover better ways to automate things, it would be helpful to have the ability to delete multiple automations all at once when they are no…

posts.author: Mysticat (Misty Baker)
posts.cookedHtml:
I have a long list of automations on one board. As new features are added and I discover better ways to automate things, it would be helpful to have the ability to delete multiple automations all at once when they are no longer needed.

As of now, you have to individually delete each one. Providing a checkbox / batch action system for automation lists like we have on board items would be helpful.

posts.author: daniel.jarolim (Daniel)
posts.cookedHtml: plus 1, i just have to delete manually 5OO automations from cloned Board.

posts.author: slkorg (Shawna Organisciak)
posts.cookedHtml: Yes, please! Whenever I clone a board for structure, I spent too long deleting each automation manually - either ability to batch delete, delete all, or when cloning a board, ability to choose if the automations are duplicated as well.

posts.author: wessel (Wessel Labuschagne)
posts.cookedHtml: Please Monday, this is badly needed. Where do we check if this request is already part of the development pipeline?
